title: Tetracustelma schaffneri
taxonomy: Tetracustelma schaffneri is classified within the plant kingdom as an angiosperm, specifically belonging to the family Orobanchaceae. It is a parasitic plant, which means it obtains its nutrients by connecting to the roots of another plant. As a member of the Orobanchaceae family, Tetracustelma schaffneri is closely related to other parasitic plants such as the broomrape and the dodder. The exact classification of Tetracustelma schaffneri can be broken down further into its genus and species levels. However, more research may be needed to confirm its classification.
preparations: Unfortunately, I do not have any information about herbal preparations of Tetracustelma schaffneri.
